ruleId.description: Habitat pattern candidate id. Candidate generation does not register a Habitat rule.

ownerProject.description: Owning Nx project for the Habitat rule.

patternName.description: Optional Grit pattern name; defaults to the rule id without a grit- prefix.

lifecycle.description: Pattern lifecycle to generate. Registered lifecycles are fail-closed until the Pattern Authority Manifest and proof gates are accepted.

openspecChangeId.description: OpenSpec change id that owns the candidate draft, when known.

manifestPath.description: Canonical Pattern Authority Manifest path required for registered lifecycles.
